completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 1 completed: Created CanonicalChain infrastructure with Z-indexed chain through CanonicalMCS. Proved monotonicity, GContent/HContent inclusion, and FMCS conversion. All theorems sorry-free, build passes.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 (Infrastructure) completed. CanonicalChain.lean created with all required structures and theorems. Ready for Phase 2 (Dovetailing Enumeration).
